# Ignore exported CSV files
*.csv

# Ignore all files in the raw_data directory
/raw_data/

# Ignore temporary files
*.tmp
*.log

# Ignore database configuration files
*.db
*.sql

# Ignore all files in a specific directory
/temp/

# Ignore OS-generated files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Ignore Python virtual environments
venv/
.env
mdc_analytics_env/

# Ignore IDE or editor settings
.vscode/
.idea/

# Ignore compiled code
*.class
*.pyc
*.o
*.out

# Ignore sensitive credential files (if any)
config.yaml
config.json
credentials.txt
